items.title: DEDICATED TO SAVING OUR OCEANS
items.subtitle: THROUGH ENGINEERING
items.desc: H2 Industries was founded with a single unwavering mission: to develop industrial water management products that actively reduce environmental harm.

items.title: PRECISION ENGINEERING
items.subtitle: FOR THE TOUGHEST ENVIRONMENTS
items.desc: Every product is precision-engineered to meet the most demanding industrial and environmental standards.

items.title: MODULAR ENCLOSURES
items.subtitle: BUILT TO LAST
items.desc: We design for compatibility with emerging hydrogen and clean-energy projects, and for long-term protection of waterways.

items.title: SUSTAINABLE IMPACT
items.subtitle: GLOBAL REACH
items.desc: We engineer products that reduce pollutant entry into stormwater systems, contributing to a cleaner, healthier planet.
points: Contributes to a cleaner, healthier planet

header.subtitle: Engineered for absolute reliability. Designed to redefine industry standards.

items.title: WHO WE ARE
items.desc: Industry leaders in advanced water management, forged on a foundation of precision and environmental stewardship.

items.title: WHAT WE DO
items.desc: We engineer cutting-edge infrastructure. Intercepting pollutants and providing robust systems for complex urban environments.

items.title: WHY TRUST US
items.desc: Decades of rigorous testing. Our solutions don't just meet standards—they define them. We build partnerships, not just products.

items.title: OUR GUARANTEE
items.desc: Unwavering durability and precision-machined quality. Every product is built to endure the absolute toughest conditions.

items.title: Precision-Engineered Drainage
items.desc: Machined to exacting tolerances, delivering consistent performance in municipal and civil stormwater infrastructure. Features a segmented barrel system for adaptable depth configurations.

items.title: Modular Sampling Stations
items.desc: A secure access platform for environmental engineers. The flat-panel dual-door design provides full interior visibility and accommodates complex probe assemblies.

items.title: Black Series Column Drainage
items.desc: Designed for urban environments demanding durability and aesthetics. Features an integrated stabilising foot plate for secure road and kerb installations.

header.title: TECHNOLOGY &
header.subtitle: Pushing the boundaries of industrial production. We leverage advanced automation, AI-driven quality control, and precision tooling to deliver unmatched reliability at scale.

items.title: Automation Core
items.desc: Robotics-assisted fabrication lines minimizing human error and maximizing output consistency.

items.title: Precision Engineering
items.desc: Tolerance controls down to the micron ensuring seamless assembly of multi-part drainage structures.

items.title: Smart Diagnostics
items.desc: Integrated telemetry options for real-time flow rate monitoring and leak detection.

items.title: Resilience Testing
items.desc: Automated hydrostatic pressure testing applied to every batch before dispatch.

header.title: RESEARCH &
header.subtitle: We don't just manufacture components; we engineer the future of water infrastructure. Our dedicated R&D division constantly explores new polymers, advanced moulding techniques, and sustainable materials to ensure our products outperform industry standards.

features.title: Advanced Materials Testing
features.desc: Simulating decades of wear in extreme environmental chambers to validate polymer longevity.

features.title: Structural Optimisation
features.desc: Using finite element analysis (FEA) to reduce material weight without compromising integrity.

features.title: Smart Integration
features.desc: Developing IoT-ready embedded sensors for real-time municipal stormwater network monitoring.

features.title: Sustainable Prototyping
features.desc: 3D printing initial models using recycled composites before finalizing injection molds.

header.title: INFRASTRUCTURE &
header.subtitle: Scale meets precision. Our distributed manufacturing network combines vast production capacity with specialized, highly-controlled operational zones.

facilities.title: Primary Extrusion Facility
facilities.desc: 120,000 sq ft unit dedicated to high-volume polymer processing.

facilities.title: Quality Assurance Lab
facilities.desc: Climate-controlled testing environment with advanced spectroscopy.

facilities.title: Logistics Hub
facilities.desc: Automated warehousing ensuring rapid dispatch across North America.

facilities.title: Heavy Fabrication Wing
facilities.desc: Specialized sector for custom steel reinforcement and structural assembly.

header.title: MANUFACTURING
header.subtitle: Our facilities are equipped with state-of-the-art machinery capable of processing advanced polymers and metals. We control the entire production cycle to guarantee unparalleled quality.

items.title: Heavy-Duty Injection Moulding
items.desc: High-tonnage moulding capable of producing large structural drainage components with absolute dimensional stability.

items.title: Industrial Fabrication
items.desc: Custom steel and heavy polymer fabrication for specialized municipal and industrial infrastructure projects.

items.title: Precision Machining
items.desc: CNC milling and turning for critical sealing surfaces and complex valve components.

items.title: Custom Engineering
items.desc: Bespoke design-to-manufacture services tailoring products to specific environmental and site requirements.

header.title: Our Manufacturing
header.subtitle: Every H2 Industries product passes through a disciplined five-stage manufacturing process — ensuring precision, reliability, and environmental performance.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Thorough design process — identifying requirements, environmental impacts, and performance targets before a single part is drawn.
steps.detail: CAD modelling · Feasibility studies · Environmental impact assessment

steps.title: Engineering
steps.desc: Translating design concepts into precision technical specifications. Material selection, structural analysis, and compliance requirements are validated.
steps.detail: Material science · Structural analysis · Compliance review

steps.title: Manufacturing
steps.desc: Products are manufactured using precision CNC machining, injection moulding, and polymer forming processes — ensuring exact dimensional accuracy.
steps.detail: CNC machining · Injection moulding · Quality-controlled fabrication

steps.title: Testing
steps.desc: Every product undergoes rigorous testing for dimensional accuracy, material performance, and environmental durability before release.
steps.detail: Dimensional verification · Load testing · Environmental simulation

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Finished products are quality-checked, packaged, and dispatched — from single units to large-scale infrastructure project orders.
steps.detail: Packaging & protection · Project delivery · Customer support

header.title: THE H2
header.subtitle: Designed for maximum durability in harsh environments, the H2 Curb Box sets the standard for municipal water infrastructure reliability.

items.name: Modular Sampling Station — Type A
items.description: Compact dual-door modular sampling enclosure with integrated stainless steel valve and probe assembly. Designed for accessible water sampling in confined stormwater environments.
features: Dual-door access panel
316 stainless steel valve
Corrosion-resistant body
Tamper-resistant fasteners

items.name: Modular Sampling Station — Type B
items.description: Wide-body modular sampling station with optimised dual-compartment layout. Features integrated stainless probe assembly and enhanced interior access for maintenance teams.
features: Wide-body enclosure
Enhanced access geometry
Integrated probe mount
UV-stabilised polymer

items.name: Aluminium Inlet Drain — Standard
items.description: Precision-machined aluminium stormwater inlet drain with conical base and segmented barrel sections. Engineered for high-flow municipal drainage applications.
features: Machined aluminium construction
Segmented modular barrel
Conical flange base
H2 Industries branded caps

items.name: Polymer Column Drain — Black Series
items.description: High-density polymer column drainage system in matte black finish. Features a stabilising foot plate and removable top cap for secure installation.
features: HDPE moulded construction
Stabilising foot plate
Removable top cap
Matte black coating

items.name: Aluminium Inlet Drain — Extended
items.description: Extended-barrel variant of the aluminium inlet drain series. Additional barrel section provides greater depth accommodation for deep kerb or road infrastructure.
features: Extended barrel depth
Precision machined finish
Screw-fit cap with grating
Anodised surface treatment

items.name: Sampling Station — Concrete Environment
items.description: H2 sampling station system shown in a concrete industrial environment — demonstrating fit and finish in real-world structural settings.
features: In-situ installation ready
Heavy-duty exterior
Anti-UV coating
Industrial environment rated

items.name: Modular Enclosure Unit — Closed Body

features: Side-access port
Integrated probe outlet
Locking top lid
Compact profile

features: Full-panel door access
Bottom probe pass-through
Top-mount valve
Dual-latch closure

items.name: Stainless Steel Sampling Probe — Long Reach
items.description: Long-reach stainless steel sampling probe with matte black polymer carrier housing. Engineered for deep pipe insertion, maintenance access, and water quality monitoring.
features: Long-reach 316 stainless rod
Black polymer carrier
Precision tip fitting
Drop-in installation

items.name: Polymer Column Drain — Water Series
items.description: Compact black polymer column drain from the H2 Water Series. Engineered with precision top cap detailing and branded barrel rings.
features: Water Series branding
Precision top cap
Branded barrel rings
Compact footprint

items.name: H2 Heavy Duty Screw-Type & Slip-Type Valve Boxes (5 1/4")
items.description: Cast iron two-piece and three-piece valve boxes designed to provide secure access to underground gate valves. Available in screw-type and slip-type configurations with WATER or SEWER marked drop-in or locking lids.
features: ASTM A48 Class 35B Grey Iron construction
AASHTO H-20 heavy highway traffic load rated
Screw-type and slip-type telescoping height adjustment
TxDOT & regional municipal waterworks approved

items.name: H2 Heavy Duty Traffic Manhole Ring & Cover (24" - 36" Opening)
items.description: Machined bearing seat manhole frames and covers for municipal storm, sewer, and water systems. Delivers non-rocking, heavy traffic support for roads and municipal infrastructure.
features: Ductile Iron ASTM A536 & Grey Iron Class 35B
Precision machined bearing seats prevent rattling under traffic
Custom municipal logo & lettering options (City of Houston, Dallas, Austin)
Available in watertight gasketed and bolt-down configurations

items.name: H2 Municipal Sewer Cleanout & Access Box
items.description: Heavy-duty cast iron cleanout housings engineered for residential and municipal lateral line access. Designed to withstand surface traffic while protecting cleanout plugs.
features: Heavy-duty rim and protective cast iron lid
Compatible with countersunk brass cleanout plugs
Corrosion-resistant asphaltic dip coating
Engineered for sub-grade lateral protection

items.name: H2 Cast Iron & Polymer Hybrid Meter Box Assemblies
items.description: Protective underground enclosures for residential and commercial water meters. Available with heavy cast iron lids featuring touch-read AMR/AMI sensor ports and high-density polymer bodies.

High-strength UV-stabilised polymer body with cast iron lid
Pedestrian and light vehicular traffic load capacity
Locking lid mechanism to prevent unauthorized tampering

items.name: H2 Storm Drainage Catch Basin Frames & Grates
items.description: High-capacity storm inlet frames, curb inlet assemblies, and trench grates designed for maximum hydraulic flow and bicycle safety compliance on municipal roadways.
features: ADA compliant & bicycle-safe slot patterns
AASHTO H-20 / HS-20 heavy highway traffic load certified
Vandal-resistant bolt-down security options
Curb inlet & drop inlet frame configurations

items.name: H2 AWWA C153 & C110 Ductile Iron Pipe Fittings
items.description: Full line of Mechanical Joint (MJ) and Flanged ductile iron fittings including bends, tees, crosses, reducers, and sleeves manufactured to AWWA C153 compact and C110 standards.
features: AWWA C153 compact & AWWA C110 full-body specifications
NSF/ANSI 61 & NSF 372 certified lead-free for potable water
Cement mortar lined (AWWA C104) / Fusion bonded epoxy
350 PSI working pressure rating for high-pressure water mains

items.name: H2 MJ Gasket Packs & Corten T-Head Bolt Sets
items.description: High-strength Corten low-alloy steel T-head bolts and heavy-duty SBR/EPDM gaskets for Mechanical Joint pipe, valve, and fitting installations.
features: High-strength corrosion-resistant Corten steel (ASTM A242)
Standard SBR & transition gaskets for Ductile Iron and PVC
Includes heavy hex nuts meeting ANSI/AWWA C111/A21.11
Color-coded job site packaging for instant identification

items.name: H2 Integrated Restrained Adapter Coupling System
items.description: Innovative integrated mechanical joint adapter allowing rapid, rigid connection of valves and fittings without external thrust blocks or long pipe spools.
features: Integrates mechanical joint restraint into compact fitting
Eliminates pipe movement & joint separation under pressure
Short lay-length ideal for tight vault & valve box installations
350 PSI pressure rated with full 2:1 safety factor

items.name: H2 Wedge-Action Mechanical Joint Restraint (Series 4000)
items.description: Wedge-action restraint glands engineered for plastic pressure pipes, PVC pipe, and ductile iron installations. Features auto-torque twist-off actuating screws for error-free installation.
features: Heat-treated ductile iron gripping wedges for maximum hold
Torque-limiting twist-off nuts guarantee exact torque without special tools
Dual compatibility on both Ductile Iron and AWWA C900 PVC pipe
350 PSI rating with full thrust restraint efficiency

items.name: H2 AWWA Resilient Wedge Gate Valve (NRS & OS&Y)
items.description: AWWA C515 / C509 resilient wedge gate valves with fusion-bonded epoxy coating inside and out. Delivers bubble-tight shutoff and low operating torque for municipal water mains.
features: AWWA C515 reduced-wall ductile iron resilient wedge design
EPDM fully encapsulated ductile iron wedge
250 PSI & 300 PSI working pressure rating
NSF/ANSI 61 and NSF/ANSI 372 lead-free certified

items.description: Grade adjustment rings, valve box extensions, riser rings, and specialty municipal castings designed for road resurfacing and utility grade adjustments without excavation.
features: Rapid road grade elevation without costly pavement excavation
Fits standard valve boxes & manhole frames seamlessly
Heavy-duty cast iron durability under traffic loads
Approved under TxDOT and regional road authority specs

items.name: H2 Mechanical Joint Wedge Restraint for Ductile Iron Pipe (Series 3000)
items.description: Heavy-duty mechanical joint wedge restraint gland engineered specifically for ductile iron pipe mains. Features individually moving wedges that increase grip force as line pressure increases.
features: High-strength ductile iron Grade 65-45-12 body construction
Precision machined heat-treated wedges bite into ductile pipe wall
Twist-off actuating bolt heads ensure positive visual installation check
350 PSI water working pressure rating with 2:1 safety factor

items.name: H2 Restraint Harness Assembly for C900 PVC Pipe (Series 1100)
items.description: Split serrated restraint ring and tie-rod assembly designed to restrain push-on PVC pipe bell joints and mechanical joint fittings against thrust loads.
features: Full 360-degree contact non-crushing serrated clamping band
High-strength low-alloy Corten tie rods and hex nuts included
Prevents joint pull-out on municipal PVC water distribution lines
Easily retrofitted onto existing C900 PVC pipe installations

items.name: H2 AWWA C110 Full-Body Ductile Iron Flanged Fittings
items.description: Heavy-duty AWWA C110 full-body flanged ductile iron fittings designed for water treatment plants, pump stations, and exposed vault piping systems.
features: Heavy-wall AWWA C110 full-body pattern for severe duty
Class 125 & Class 250 flange bolt pattern specifications
Double-coated asphaltic or NSF 61 epoxy interior lining
250 PSI / 300 PSI working pressure capability

items.name: H2 AWWA OS&Y Flanged Resilient Wedge Gate Valve
items.description: Outside Screw and Yoke (OS&Y) rising stem resilient wedge gate valves engineered for fire protection mains, industrial facilities, and indoor vault installations.

Rising bronze stem provides clear visual position indication

header.title: QUALITY &
header.subtitle: Our multi-stage quality assurance protocol guarantees that every product leaving our facility is engineered to last generations.

workflow.title: Material Inspection
workflow.desc: Raw polymer batches are tested for melt flow index and tensile strength before entering production.

workflow.title: In-Process QC
workflow.desc: Automated optical inspection during injection moulding ensures zero dimensional deviation.

workflow.title: Final Verification
workflow.desc: Assembled units undergo hydrostatic pressure and load-bearing tests mimicking real-world stress.

workflow.title: Certification
workflow.desc: Every batch is logged with full traceability, meeting or exceeding national compliance standards.

header.title: ENGINEERING
header.subtitle: Infrastructure demands absolute certainty. Our technical specifications align with rigorous international and local standards, ensuring every product is load-rated, environmentally safe, and built for purpose.

items.title: MARINE & COASTAL

header.title: WORLDWIDE
header.subtitle: Seamlessly delivering heavy industrial infrastructure from our production floors to your site, anywhere in the world. Our integrated logistics network ensures projects stay on schedule, irrespective of geography.

header.title: MANUFACTURING
header.subtitle: We build infrastructure to manage the world's most vital resource. That responsibility extends to how we manufacture our products — prioritizing energy efficiency, waste reduction, and sustainable polymers.

initiatives.title: Water Conservation
initiatives.desc: Closed-loop water cooling systems in our manufacturing facilities.

initiatives.title: Material Recovery
initiatives.desc: Of all manufacturing polymer by-products are reclaimed and re-processed.

initiatives.title: Emission Reduction
initiatives.desc: VOC emissions across all our primary injection moulding lines.

initiatives.title: Green Packaging
initiatives.desc: Biodegradable or fully recyclable transport packaging.

whoWeAre.title: WHO WE ARE
paragraphs: We are more than just engineers. H2 Industries was forged by a collective of environmental scientists, material experts, and heavy infrastructure specialists with a singular, unwavering focus: to stop the degradation of our natural waterways.

For decades, the standard approach to municipal water management was passive. We exist to make it active. We build the physical barriers that stand between industrial pollution and the pristine oceans we rely on.

whatWeDo.title: WHAT WE ARE
paragraphs: We engineer and manufacture next-generation hydro-infrastructure. From heavy-duty stormwater inlet drains to highly sensitive modular sampling stations, we provide the physical architecture required to intercept pollutants before they reach our oceans.

Our facilities utilize advanced polymer extrusion, precision CNC machining, and rigorous hydrostatic testing. We don't just build parts; we engineer complete, fail-safe systems for the most demanding urban environments.

features.title: Robust Architecture
features.desc: Infrastructure designed for heavy urban loads.

features.title: Smart Monitoring
features.desc: Integrated sampling access for real-time data.

whatWeGive.title: WHAT WE ARE
paragraphs: When you specify an H2 product, you are buying absolute certainty. We give our partners the confidence that their infrastructure will perform flawlessly, decade after decade.
We give back to the planet. Every product deployed is a direct investment in cleaner oceans, safer drinking water, and a sustainable legacy for future generations.

header.title: TRUSTED BY
header.subtitle: See what leading municipal authorities, civil engineers, and environmental agencies say about our infrastructure solutions.

items.quote: H2 Industries' modular sampling stations have transformed how we monitor stormwater outfalls. The build quality is exceptional, and their responsiveness is unmatched.
items.author: Sarah Jenkins

items.quote: When you specify an H2 product, you know it's going to outlast the project itself. Their custom fabrication team delivered exactly what our coastal infrastructure required.
items.author: David Chen

items.quote: The dimensional accuracy on their heavy-duty injection moulded components is incredible. Zero rework on site, perfect fit every single time.
items.author: Marcus Thorne
